expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md the drafted scenarios explicitly include the four focus areas as section headers and scenarios: "- Prompt handling (Workstation embedded Library Report Editor)", "- Template save", "- Report builder loading & prompt element navigation", and "- Visible report title outcomes (window title + in-app title)".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md states: "Output is a subcategory-first scenario set (no canonical top-level groupings like Security/Compatibility/E2E). Scenarios are written with nested atomic actions and observable outcomes, consistent with references/phase4a-contract.md." The result.md structure matches this: subcategory bullets with nested steps and observable verification points (e.g., "Title is user-facing and meaningful...", "No prompt UI is displayed...").
